subcommands.name: account
subcommands.description: prints the primary account Apple ID

subcommands.name: home
subcommands.description: opens MAS Preview app page in a browser

subcommands.description: display app information from the Mac App Store

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: lists apps from the Mac App Store which are currently installed

subcommands.name: lucky
subcommands.description: install the first result from the Mac App Store

states.name: application
states.description: the application you want to Install

states.name: application
states.description: the application you want to Open

subcommands.name: outdated
subcommands.description: lists pending updates from the Mac App Store

subcommands.name: purchase
subcommands.description: purchase and download free apps from the Mac App Store

states.name: application
states.description: the application you want to purchase

subcommands.name: search
subcommands.description: search for apps from the Mac App Store

states.name: application
states.description: the application you want to Search

subcommands.name: signin
subcommands.description: sign in to the Mac App Store

subcommands.name: signout
subcommands.description: sign out of the Mac App Store

subcommands.description: uninstall app installed from the Mac App Store

states.description: the application you want to uninstall
